definitions: A tire equipped with small metal studs embedded in the tread, designed to improve traction on ice and packed snow.
A type of winter tire that has metal or ceramic studs protruding from its surface to enhance grip in icy conditions.
examples: Studded tires are often restricted in warmer months.
Many drivers in snowy regions rely on studded tires for safety.
The mechanic recommended studded tires for the upcoming winter.
